message: Can you check what port the API server is running on in project/config.yaml?
Change the API port to 9090 in the config.
Actually wait, change it to 8443 instead. The other services need 9090.
What SSL certificate path is configured?
Set the log level to debug and increase max_connections to 500.
What's the current redis host configured?
Switch redis from localhost to redis.internal:6380
No wait, redis should be on the default port 6379, just change the host.
Show me all the timeout values in the config.
Actually, only double the read timeouts. Write timeouts should stay the same.
Summarize all the changes we've made to the config so far.
